items.name: MadsLorentzen/ai-job-search
items.description: AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code. Fork it, fill in your profile, and let Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.
items.description_zh: 基于 Claude Code 构建的人工智能驱动的职位申请框架。叉开它，填写你的个人资料，让克劳德评估工作，定制简历，写求职信，并为你的面试做好准备。

items.name: Zackriya-Solutions/meetily
items.description: Privacy first, AI meeting assistant with 4x faster Parakeet/Whisper live transcription, speaker diarization, and Ollama summarization built on Rust. 100% local processing. no cloud required. Meetily (Meetly Ai -https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted, Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.
items.description_zh: 隐私第一，AI 会议助手具有 4 倍快的 Parakeet/Whisper 实时转录、发言者分类和基于 Rust 构建的 Ollama 摘要。 100%本地加工。无需云。 Meetily（Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai）是适用于 macOS 和 Windows 的排名第一的自托管开源人工智能会议记录工具。

items.name: addyosmani/agent-skills
items.description: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
items.description_zh: AI 编码代理的生产级工程技能。

items.name: ruvnet/RuView
items.description: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
items.description_zh: π RuView 将商用 WiFi 信号转化为实时空间智能、生命体征监测和存在检测 - 所有这些都无需视频像素。

items.name: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from Anthropic - Claude Fable 5, Opus 4.8, Claude Code, Claude Design. OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 Thinking, GPT 5.5 Instant, Codex. Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash, 3.1 Pro, Antigravity. xAI - Grok, Cursor, Copilot, VS Code, Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.
items.description_zh: 从 Anthropic 中提取的系统提示 - Claude Fable 5、Opus 4.8、Claude Code、Claude Design。 OpenAI - ChatGPT 5.5 思维、GPT 5.5 即时、Codex。 Google - Gemini 3.5 Flash、3.1 Pro、反重力。 xAI - Grok、Cursor、Copilot、VS Code、Perplexity 等。定期更新。

items.name: TencentCloud/CubeSandbox
items.description: Instant, Concurrent, Secure & Lightweight Sandbox for AI Agents.
items.description_zh: 适用于 AI 代理的即时、并发、安全和轻量级沙箱。

items.name: AhmadIbrahiim/Website-downloader
items.description: 💡 Download the complete source code of any website (including all assets). [ Javascripts, Stylesheets, Images ] using Node.js
items.description_zh: 💡 下载任何网站的完整源代码（包括所有资产）。 [ JavaScript、样式表、图像 ] 使用 Node.js

items.name: steipete/CodexBar
items.description: Show usage stats for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code, without having to login.
items.description_zh: 显示 OpenAI Codex 和 Claude Code 的使用统计信息，无需登录。

items.name: dotnet/skills
items.description: Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#
items.description_zh: 使用 .NET 和 C# 协助 AI 编码代理的技能存储库

items.name: iOfficeAI/OfficeCLI
items.description: OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
items.description_zh: OfficeCLI 是第一个也是最好的 Office 套件，专为 AI 代理构建，用于读取、编辑和自动化 Word、Excel 和 PowerPoint 文件。免费、开源、单一二进制文件，无需安装 Office。

items.name: bradautomates/claude-video
items.description: Give Claude the ability to watch any video. /watch downloads, extracts frames, transcribes, hands it all to Claude.
items.description_zh: 让克劳德能够观看任何视频。 /watch 下载、提取帧、转录，然后将其全部交给 Claude。

items.name: kyutai-labs/pocket-tts
items.description: A TTS that fits in your CPU (and pocket)
items.description_zh: 适合您 CPU（和口袋）的 TTS

items.name: hesreallyhim/awesome-claude-code
items.description: A hand-picked collection of the finest of resources for the most awesome of agents, Claude Code, the undisputed champion of coding companions, from the unstoppable team at Anthropic PBC. A delectable showcase of top tier skills, ambidextrous agents, scintillating status lines, top notch developer tooling, and also we have plugins
items.description_zh: 为最出色的特工 Claude Code 精心挑选的最优质资源，Claude Code 是无可争议的编码伙伴冠军，来自 Anthropic PBC 势不可挡的团队。顶级技能、灵巧的代理、闪烁的状态栏、一流的开发人员工具的令人愉快的展示，而且我们还有插件
